applicability_notes: Unary elementwise zero-equality predicate. Golden function is lambda x: torch.eq(x, 0). Output is a boolean-like mask; in model code (Mixtral MoE gating fallback path) it is immediately typecast to bfloat16 via ttnn.typecast(mask, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16) before use in arithmetic — a fusion candidate chain is `(x == 0).to(torch.bfloat16)` -> ttnn.eqz + ttnn.typecast. Supports preallocated output_tensor and queue_id kwargs per unit tests.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.eqz(input_tensor)

placement_observations.source: call_site: MoE gating path; intermediate topk output consumed and deallocated immediately (deallocate(True)), default interleaved memory config, no explicit memory_config passed
unit_test: output_tensor preallocated via data_gen_with_range and passed as output_tensor= kwarg with queue_id=0; default interleaved placement
